meta.name: Unkillables Rebalance
meta.note: De-invincibles the billion-HP bosses (finite, gunfire-killable body pools), makes the Grabber/Stalker far easier to stun, and scales armoured-zone damage gates down. Overlaid on the datamined vanilla enemy data.

codexKill.note: **Unkillables Rebalance** removes the invincibility: the body is a finite **330,000** HP pool now, so sustained heavy / anti-tank fire kills it outright — no stun-and-DetPack required.
**Unkillables Rebalance** removes the invincibility: the body is a finite **286,870** HP pool now, so sustained heavy / anti-tank fire kills it outright — no stun-and-DetPack required.
**Unkillables Rebalance** removes the invincibility: the body is a finite **328,000** HP pool now, so sustained heavy / anti-tank fire kills it outright — no stun-and-DetPack required.
**Unkillables Rebalance** removes the invincibility: the body is a finite **308,700** HP pool now, so sustained heavy / anti-tank fire kills it outright — no stun-and-DetPack required.
**Unkillables Rebalance** removes the invincibility: the body is a finite **372,000** HP pool now, so sustained heavy / anti-tank fire kills it outright — no stun-and-DetPack required.
**Unkillables Rebalance** removes the invincibility: the body is a finite **213,000** HP pool now, so sustained heavy / anti-tank fire kills it outright — no stun-and-DetPack required.
Body HP is unchanged (still a stun-then-DetPack kill), but **Unkillables Rebalance** drops its stagger threshold to **1,000** (20× easier to stun) and its sync-kill grab to ≤ **1,000** HP.

enemies.note: Also scales the game's **19 internal armour-damage thresholds** (`BPC_IncomingDamageMod`) down to ~**20–69%** of vanilla, so the armoured mechs' plated zones take far more punishment per hit and break faster. These are internal damage-gate constants shared across the armoured bosses — distinct from the per-zone HP shown on each mech card (which the mod does not change), so they're noted here rather than applied to the zones.
